 78. Code:

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    stream << packet.packet_id;
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a non-const copy of the buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> non_const_buffer(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(non_const_buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    CompactPacket packet;
    stream >> packet.packet_id;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return packet;
}
```

}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    // Create a buffer_read_adaptor for the buffer_data
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>> read_adaptor(buffer_data);

    // Then use read() to consume the data
    read_adaptor.read(peeked_data.data(), peek_size);

    return peeked_data;
}

 Steps for `serialize_protocol_packet`:
  1. Create a buffer (std::vector<uint8_t>) to hold the serialized data.
  2. Create a binary_stream object for writing, using the buffer.
  3. Convert packet.message_id from native to big-endian using hexi::endian::native_to_big.
  4. Write the converted message_id using the stream's write method.
  5. Convert each element in packet.data_values from native to big-endian.
  6. Write the converted data_values using write_container method.
  7. Convert packet.checksum from native to big-endian.
  8. Write the converted checksum using the stream's write method.
  9. Return the buffer containing the serialized data.

 Steps for `deserialize_protocol_packet`:
  1. Create a binary_stream object for reading, using the input buffer.
  2. Read the message_id (uint32_t) from the stream.
  3. Convert the read message_id from big-endian to native using hexi::endian::big_to_native.
  4. Read the data_count (uint32_t) from the stream (this is the count of data_values).
